user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my asset requisitions with details like requisition number, date, requested asset, quantity and status, so that I can track my requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Asset Requisition List screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for requisition number, requisition date, requested asset, requested quantity, to be returned before, status and task

user_story: As an Employee, I want to add a new asset requisition, so that I can request an asset I need for my work
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Asset Requisition List screen; When I click Add new asset requisition; Then a form to submit a new asset requisition is opened

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my requisitions by a period with From and To dates, so that I can find requisitions raised in a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Asset Requisition List screen; When I select a From and To date and click Search; Then only requisitions within that period are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my requisitions by status such as Pending Approval, Pending for Issuance, Issued/Acknowledged, Rejected, Withdrawn or Returned, so that I can track the progress of my requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Asset Requisition List screen; When I select a status and click Search; Then only requisitions matching that status are listed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the applied filters, so that I can clear my selections and view all requisitions again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period or status filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters are cleared and the full list is shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see the return-before date and pending actions for each requisition, so that I can complete required tasks like returning assets on time
acceptance_criteria: Given a requisition has a task and return date; When I view the list; Then the To be returned before date and Task action are displayed
